metadata.description: HSV color adjustment - requires RGB↔HSV conversion

summary: Adjusts Hue, Saturation, Value (brightness). Requires converting RGB to HSV, adjusting, then back to RGB.

parameters.Hue: Rotation in HSV hue space (-0.5 to 0.5 or 0-360°)
parameters.Saturation: Color intensity multiplier (0 = grayscale, 2 = double saturation)

complexity: Requires RGB-HSV conversion functions (non-trivial in shader code)
compatibility_loss_30_percent: RGB-HSV conversion precision, extreme color edge cases
typical_use: Color grading, tint adjustment, desaturation, creative color effects
